name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Direct income support scheme providing Rs 6,000 per year to small and marginal farmer families in three equal installments of Rs 2,000 each, directly into their bank accounts.
descriptionHi: छोटे और सीमांत किसान परिवारों को प्रति वर्ष 6,000 रुपये की प्रत्यक्ष आय सहायता, 2,000 रुपये की तीन समान किस्तों में सीधे उनके बैंक खातों में।
benefits: Rs 6,000/year in 3 installments of Rs 2,000 each
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) to bank account
All landholding farmer families eligible (since 2019 amendment)
No intermediary - money goes directly to farmer
eligibility: All farmer families with cultivable land
Must have Aadhaar card
Must have bank account linked to Aadhaar
Excludes institutional land holders, income tax payers, government employees
howToApply: Visit local CSC (Common Service Centre) or apply online at pmkisan.gov.in. Required documents: Aadhaar card, land records, bank passbook.
howToApplyHi: स्थानीय CSC (कॉमन सर्विस सेंटर) पर जाएं या pmkisan.gov.in पर ऑनलाइन आवेदन करें। आवश्यक दस्तावेज: आधार कार्ड, भूमि रिकॉर्ड, बैंक पासबुक।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: PMFBY (Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana)
description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme that provides financial support to farmers suffering crop loss due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases. Farmers pay a nominal premium of 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, and 5% for commercial/horticultural crops.
descriptionHi: व्यापक फसल बीमा योजना जो प्राकृतिक आपदाओं, कीटों और रोगों से फसल नुकसान झेलने वाले किसानों को वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करती है। किसान खरीफ के लिए 2%, रबी के लिए 1.5% और वाणिज्यिक/बागवानी फसलों के लिए 5% का मामूली प्रीमियम देते हैं।
benefits: Covers all food crops, oilseeds, and commercial/horticultural crops
Low premium: 2% Kharif, 1.5% Rabi, 5% commercial crops
Full sum insured with no capping
Covers prevented sowing, mid-season adversity, post-harvest losses
Use of technology (satellite imagery, drones) for quick claim settlement
Add-on coverage for wildlife attack, hailstorm
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
Both loanee and non-loanee farmers (voluntary since 2020)
Sharecroppers and tenant farmers eligible with proper documents
howToApply: Apply through nearest bank branch, CSC, or PMFBY portal. Enrollment deadline: Before cutoff date for each season. Documents: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, sowing certificate.
howToApplyHi: निकटतम बैंक शाखा, CSC या PMFBY पोर्टल के माध्यम से आवेदन करें। नामांकन समय सीमा: प्रत्येक मौसम की अंतिम तिथि से पहले। दस्तावेज: आधार, भूमि रिकॉर्ड, बैंक खाता, बुवाई प्रमाण पत्र।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Provides farmers with timely and adequate credit for agricultural operations including crop production, post-harvest expenses, farm maintenance, and consumption needs. Interest subvention of 2% makes effective rate 7% p.a. (4% if repaid on time).
descriptionHi: किसानों को कृषि कार्यों जैसे फसल उत्पादन, कटाई पश्चात व्यय, खेत रखरखाव और उपभोग आवश्यकताओं के लिए समय पर और पर्याप्त ऋण प्रदान करता है। 2% ब्याज सबवेंशन से प्रभावी दर 7% प्रतिवर्ष (समय पर भुगतान पर 4%) होती है।
ministry: Ministry of Finance / Department of Financial Services
benefits: Revolving credit facility - withdraw and repay as needed
Credit limit covers crop production, maintenance, and consumption
Interest rate: 7% p.a. with 3% prompt repayment incentive (effective 4%)
Personal accident insurance coverage of Rs 50,000 (death) and Rs 25,000 (disability)
No collateral for loans up to Rs 1.6 lakh
Now extended to fishermen and animal husbandry farmers
ATM-enabled RuPay debit card
eligibility: All farmers - individual/joint, owner cultivators, tenant farmers, sharecroppers
Self-Help Groups (SHGs) and Joint Liability Groups (JLGs)
Fishermen and animal husbandry farmers
howToApply: Apply at nearest commercial bank, cooperative bank, or regional rural bank. Documents: Land records, Aadhaar, PAN card, passport photos, crop plan.
howToApplyHi: निकटतम वाणिज्यिक बैंक, सहकारी बैंक या क्षेत्रीय ग्रामीण बैंक में आवेदन करें। दस्तावेज: भूमि रिकॉर्ड, आधार, पैन कार्ड, पासपोर्ट फोटो, फसल योजना।

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides soil health cards to all farmers carrying crop-wise recommendations of nutrients and fertilizers required for individual farms to improve soil health and its productivity.
descriptionHi: सभी किसानों को मृदा स्वास्थ्य कार्ड प्रदान करता है जिसमें व्यक्तिगत खेतों के लिए मिट्टी के स्वास्थ्य और उत्पादकता में सुधार के लिए आवश्यक पोषक तत्वों और उर्वरकों की फसल-वार सिफारिशें होती हैं।
benefits: Free soil testing for 12 parameters (pH, EC, OC, N, P, K, S, Zn, Fe, Cu, Mn, B)
Crop-wise fertilizer recommendations
Issued every 2 years (2 crop cycles)
Helps reduce fertilizer costs by balanced application
Improves soil health and crop productivity
Available online on soilhealth.dac.gov.in portal
eligibility: All farmers across India
Both landowners and tenant farmers
howToApply: Collect soil samples and submit to nearest Soil Testing Lab, Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK), or through village-level functionaries. Card issued with results and recommendations.
howToApplyHi: मिट्टी के नमूने एकत्र करें और निकटतम मृदा परीक्षण प्रयोगशाला, कृषि विज्ञान केंद्र (KVK), या ग्राम स्तरीय कार्यकर्ताओं के माध्यम से जमा करें।
helpline: Contact nearest KVK or State Agriculture Department
source: Department of Agriculture & Cooperation, Ministry of Agriculture

name: PM Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY)
description: Comprehensive scheme to ensure access to protective irrigation for all agricultural farms with the motto 'Har Khet Ko Pani' (water to every field) and 'Per Drop More Crop' through micro-irrigation.
descriptionHi: 'हर खेत को पानी' और 'प्रति बूँद अधिक फसल' के नारे के साथ सभी कृषि खेतों को सुरक्षात्मक सिंचाई सुनिश्चित करने वाली व्यापक योजना।
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare / Ministry of Jal Shakti
benefits: Subsidy on micro-irrigation (drip and sprinkler): 55% for small/marginal farmers, 45% for others
Development of water sources (bore wells, farm ponds, check dams)
Watershed development for rain-fed areas
Per Drop More Crop component for water-use efficiency
End-to-end solution from source creation to distribution to field application
eligibility: All farmer categories eligible
Higher subsidy for small and marginal farmers, SC/ST farmers
Both individual and community applications accepted
howToApply: Apply through State Agriculture/Horticulture Department or online on respective state portals. Contact Block Agriculture Officer or District Agriculture Officer.
howToApplyHi: राज्य कृषि/बागवानी विभाग या संबंधित राज्य पोर्टल पर ऑनलाइन आवेदन करें। ब्लॉक कृषि अधिकारी या जिला कृषि अधिकारी से संपर्क करें।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: National Mission on Sustainable Agriculture (NMSA)
description: Aims to make agriculture more productive, sustainable, and climate-resilient through integrated farming, soil health management, and water-use efficiency.
descriptionHi: एकीकृत खेती, मिट्टी स्वास्थ्य प्रबंधन और जल उपयोग दक्षता के माध्यम से कृषि को अधिक उत्पादक, टिकाऊ और जलवायु-प्रतिरोधी बनाने का उद्देश्य।
benefits: Support for organic farming inputs and certification
Soil health management including soil amendment
Rainfed Area Development through integrated farming systems
Climate change adaptation strategies for agriculture
Training on sustainable farming practices
Support for farm mechanization in rainfed areas
eligibility: All farmers, with focus on rainfed and dryland areas
Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs)
State Agriculture Universities and KVKs as implementing agencies
howToApply: Apply through State Agriculture Department, Krishi Vigyan Kendra, or ATMA (Agricultural Technology Management Agency) at district level.
howToApplyHi: राज्य कृषि विभाग, कृषि विज्ञान केंद्र, या जिला स्तर पर ATMA (कृषि प्रौद्योगिकी प्रबंधन एजेंसी) के माध्यम से आवेदन करें।
helpline: Contact State Agriculture Department or nearest KVK
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
description: Pan-India electronic trading portal networking existing APMC mandis to create a unified national market for agricultural commodities. Enables farmers to get better prices by accessing buyers across the country.
descriptionHi: मौजूदा APMC मंडियों को जोड़कर कृषि उपज के लिए एकीकृत राष्ट्रीय बाजार बनाने वाला अखिल भारतीय इलेक्ट्रॉनिक व्यापार पोर्टल। किसानों को देश भर के खरीदारों तक पहुँचकर बेहतर कीमत प्राप्त करने में सक्षम बनाता है।
benefits: Transparent price discovery through online bidding
Access to multiple markets and buyers across states
Real-time price information of different mandis
Online payment directly to farmer's bank account
Quality assaying facilities at mandis
Over 1,000 mandis integrated across states
Free registration for farmers
eligibility: All farmers, traders, commission agents, FPOs
Must register on e-NAM portal with Aadhaar and bank account
howToApply: Register online at enam.gov.in or at nearest e-NAM integrated mandi. Documents: Aadhaar, bank account, mobile number.
howToApplyHi: enam.gov.in पर ऑनलाइन या निकटतम ई-नाम एकीकृत मंडी में पंजीकरण करें। दस्तावेज: आधार, बैंक खाता, मोबाइल नंबर।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM)
description: Promotes farm mechanization by providing subsidized access to agricultural machinery and equipment, with special focus on small and marginal farmers.
descriptionHi: कृषि मशीनरी और उपकरणों तक सब्सिडी वाली पहुँच प्रदान करके कृषि मशीनीकरण को बढ़ावा देता है, छोटे और सीमांत किसानों पर विशेष ध्यान।
benefits: Subsidy of 40-50% on purchase of agricultural machinery
Establishment of Custom Hiring Centres (CHCs) for machinery rental
Farm Machinery Banks at village level
Higher subsidy for SC/ST/women/NE region farmers
Covers tractors, power tillers, harvesters, sprayers, seed drills, etc.
Hi-tech and high-value machinery hub at district level
eligibility: Individual farmers, FPOs, SHGs, cooperatives
Higher subsidy for small/marginal, SC/ST, women farmers
Entrepreneurs for setting up CHCs
howToApply: Apply online on agrimachinery.nic.in portal or through District Agriculture Office. Documents: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, quotation of machinery.
howToApplyHi: agrimachinery.nic.in पोर्टल पर ऑनलाइन या जिला कृषि कार्यालय के माध्यम से आवेदन करें। दस्तावेज: आधार, भूमि रिकॉर्ड, बैंक खाता, मशीनरी का कोटेशन।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
description: Promotes organic farming through cluster approach. Provides financial assistance of Rs 50,000/ha over 3 years for organic inputs, certification, and marketing support.
descriptionHi: समूह दृष्टिकोण के माध्यम से जैविक खेती को बढ़ावा देता है। जैविक आदानों, प्रमाणन और विपणन सहायता के लिए 3 वर्षों में 50,000 रुपये/हेक्टेयर की वित्तीय सहायता।
benefits: Rs 50,000/ha over 3 years (Rs 31,000 for organic inputs, Rs 8,800 for certification, Rs 10,200 for value addition/marketing)
Cluster approach - group of 50+ farmers with 50 ha area
Support for organic certification (PGS-India)
Marketing support and brand building
Training on organic farming practices
Quality control and laboratory support
eligibility: Group of minimum 50 farmers forming a cluster of 50 ha
Willing to adopt organic farming for minimum 3 years
Land must not have been under heavy chemical use
howToApply: Form a farmer group/cluster and apply through State Agriculture Department or Regional Council under PKVY. Facilitated through ATMA.
howToApplyHi: किसान समूह/क्लस्टर बनाएं और राज्य कृषि विभाग या PKVY के तहत क्षेत्रीय परिषद के माध्यम से आवेदन करें। ATMA के माध्यम से सुविधा।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY-RAFTAAR)
description: Incentivizes states to increase agriculture sector investment by providing flexible funding for agriculture development, innovation, and agri-entrepreneurship. RAFTAAR stands for Remunerative Approaches for Agriculture and Allied sector Rejuvenation.
descriptionHi: कृषि विकास, नवाचार और कृषि उद्यमिता के लिए लचीला वित्तपोषण प्रदान करके राज्यों को कृषि क्षेत्र में निवेश बढ़ाने के लिए प्रोत्साहित करता है।
benefits: Flexible funding to states for agriculture development projects
Agri-infrastructure development
Innovation and agri-entrepreneurship promotion
Support for value addition, marketing infrastructure
Agri-business incubation through RKVY-RAFTAAR
Financial assistance for agri-startups
eligibility: State Governments for project proposals
Agri-entrepreneurs and startups through innovation component
Farmer Producer Organizations
howToApply: Projects proposed by State Agriculture Departments and approved by State Level Sanctioning Committee (SLSC). For agri-entrepreneurship, apply through RKVY-RAFTAAR incubators.
howToApplyHi: राज्य कृषि विभागों द्वारा परियोजनाएं प्रस्तावित और राज्य स्तरीय स्वीकृति समिति (SLSC) द्वारा अनुमोदित। कृषि उद्यमिता के लिए RKVY-रफ्तार इनक्यूबेटर के माध्यम से आवेदन।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund (AIF)
description: Rs 1 lakh crore financing facility for creation of post-harvest management infrastructure and community farming assets. Provides 3% interest subvention and credit guarantee.
descriptionHi: कटाई पश्चात प्रबंधन अवसंरचना और सामुदायिक कृषि संपत्तियों के निर्माण के लिए 1 लाख करोड़ रुपये की वित्तपोषण सुविधा। 3% ब्याज सबवेंशन और ऋण गारंटी प्रदान करता है।
benefits: 3% interest subvention on loans up to Rs 2 crore
Credit guarantee coverage under CGTMSE for loans up to Rs 2 crore
Covers cold storage, warehouses, sorting-grading units, primary processing centers
Covers e-marketing platforms, ripening chambers, supply chain services
Loan duration up to 7 years with moratorium
eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, PACS (Primary Agricultural Credit Societies)
Marketing Cooperative Societies
SHGs, Joint Liability Groups
Agri-entrepreneurs and startups
State agencies, APMCs
howToApply: Apply online at agriinfra.dac.gov.in portal. Loan sanctioned through scheduled banks. Documents: Project report, land documents, Aadhaar, bank statements.
howToApplyHi: agriinfra.dac.gov.in पोर्टल पर ऑनलाइन आवेदन करें। ऋण अनुसूचित बैंकों के माध्यम से स्वीकृत। दस्तावेज: परियोजना रिपोर्ट, भूमि दस्तावेज, आधार, बैंक विवरण।
helpline: Contact nearest bank or District Agriculture Office
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: PM Kisan MaanDhan Yojana
description: Voluntary pension scheme for small and marginal farmers aged 18-40 years, providing minimum monthly pension of Rs 3,000 after attaining age of 60 years.
descriptionHi: 18-40 वर्ष आयु के छोटे और सीमांत किसानों के लिए स्वैच्छिक पेंशन योजना, 60 वर्ष की आयु के बाद न्यूनतम 3,000 रुपये मासिक पेंशन।
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs 3,000 after age 60
Government matches farmer's monthly contribution equally
Monthly contribution: Rs 55 (age 18) to Rs 200 (age 40)
Family pension: 50% to spouse after beneficiary's death
Auto-debit from PM-KISAN installments allowed
eligibility: Small and Marginal Farmers (land holding up to 2 hectares)
Age: 18-40 years at time of enrollment
Must not be covered under other social security schemes
Must have Aadhaar and savings bank/Jan Dhan account
howToApply: Visit nearest CSC (Common Service Centre) with Aadhaar card and bank passbook. Enrollment done by CSC operator through PM-KMY portal.
howToApplyHi: आधार कार्ड और बैंक पासबुक के साथ निकटतम CSC (कॉमन सर्विस सेंटर) जाएं। CSC ऑपरेटर द्वारा PM-KMY पोर्टल पर नामांकन।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: National Horticulture Mission (MIDH)
description: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture (MIDH) provides holistic support for horticulture development including planting material, area expansion, protected cultivation, and post-harvest management.
descriptionHi: बागवानी के एकीकृत विकास के लिए मिशन (MIDH) रोपण सामग्री, क्षेत्र विस्तार, संरक्षित खेती और कटाई पश्चात प्रबंधन सहित बागवानी विकास के लिए समग्र सहायता प्रदान करता है।
benefits: Subsidy for establishment of new orchards and plantations
Support for polyhouse/shade net construction (50% subsidy)
High-density planting support
Integrated pest management assistance
Post-harvest infrastructure: pack houses, cold storage, ripening chambers
Beekeeping promotion
Mushroom cultivation support
eligibility: All farmers for individual activities
FPOs, cooperatives for community infrastructure
Higher assistance for SC/ST and NE region
howToApply: Apply through State Horticulture Department or District Horticulture Officer. Online application through Hortnet portal in some states.
howToApplyHi: राज्य बागवानी विभाग या जिला बागवानी अधिकारी के माध्यम से आवेदन करें। कुछ राज्यों में Hortnet पोर्टल पर ऑनलाइन आवेदन।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: National Food Security Mission (NFSM)
description: Aims to increase production of rice, wheat, pulses, coarse cereals, nutri-cereals, and commercial crops through area expansion, productivity enhancement, and technology dissemination.
descriptionHi: क्षेत्र विस्तार, उत्पादकता वृद्धि और प्रौद्योगिकी प्रसार के माध्यम से चावल, गेहूँ, दालों, मोटे अनाज, पोषक अनाज और वाणिज्यिक फसलों का उत्पादन बढ़ाने का उद्देश्य।
benefits: Subsidized seed distribution of improved varieties
Assistance for micronutrients and soil ameliorants
Support for IPM/INM demonstrations
Farm machinery and equipment at subsidized rates
Cropping system-based demonstrations at farmers' fields
Seed production infrastructure
Pulses-specific special programs
eligibility: All farmers in identified districts for target crops
Priority to small and marginal farmers
howToApply: Contact Block Agriculture Officer or District Agriculture Officer. Benefits distributed through State Agriculture Department field machinery.
howToApplyHi: ब्लॉक कृषि अधिकारी या जिला कृषि अधिकारी से संपर्क करें। राज्य कृषि विभाग के क्षेत्रीय तंत्र के माध्यम से लाभ वितरित।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: Pradhan Mantri Annadata Aay Sanrakshan Abhiyan (PM-AASHA)
description: Umbrella scheme to ensure MSP (Minimum Support Price) to farmers for their produce through Price Support Scheme (PSS), Price Deficiency Payment Scheme (PDPS), and Private Procurement & Stockist Scheme (PPSS).
descriptionHi: मूल्य समर्थन योजना (PSS), मूल्य कमी भुगतान योजना (PDPS), और निजी खरीद एवं भंडारण योजना (PPSS) के माध्यम से किसानों को उनकी उपज के लिए MSP (न्यूनतम समर्थन मूल्य) सुनिश्चित करने वाली छत्र योजना।
benefits: Government procurement at MSP when market prices fall below MSP
Price Deficiency Payment: Direct payment of difference between MSP and actual selling price
Private procurement with government guarantee
Covers oilseeds, pulses, and copra under PSS
All notified crops under MSP regime
eligibility: All farmers who grow crops for which MSP is announced
Must sell through registered mandis or procurement centers
howToApply: Bring produce to nearest MSP procurement centre during procurement season. Register with local mandi/procurement agency.
howToApplyHi: खरीद मौसम के दौरान उपज को निकटतम MSP खरीद केंद्र पर लाएं। स्थानीय मंडी/खरीद एजेंसी में पंजीकरण करें।
helpline: Contact local APMC mandi or FCI/NAFED procurement centre
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: Namo Drone Didi
description: Scheme to provide drones to 15,000 women SHGs for agricultural spraying services. SHGs rent drones to farmers for pesticide/fertilizer application, earning additional income while modernizing agriculture.
descriptionHi: कृषि छिड़काव सेवाओं के लिए 15,000 महिला स्वयं सहायता समूहों को ड्रोन प्रदान करने की योजना। SHG किसानों को कीटनाशक/उर्वरक छिड़काव के लिए ड्रोन किराए पर देते हैं।
benefits: 80% subsidy on drone cost (up to Rs 8 lakhs) for women SHGs
Training for SHG members on drone operation
Additional income of Rs 1 lakh+ per year for SHGs through drone rental services
Efficient and uniform pesticide/fertilizer application
Reduces chemical exposure for farm workers
Covers larger area faster (1 acre in 8-10 minutes vs. 2-3 hours manual)
eligibility: Women Self-Help Groups registered under DAY-NRLM
At least 1 member must be trained and certified drone pilot
howToApply: Apply through District Rural Development Agency or NRLM State Mission. Training provided by ICAR/SAU/approved agencies.
howToApplyHi: जिला ग्रामीण विकास एजेंसी या NRLM राज्य मिशन के माध्यम से आवेदन करें। ICAR/SAU/अनुमोदित एजेंसियों द्वारा प्रशिक्षण।
source: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

name: Kisan Rail
description: Special trains with refrigerated coaches for transporting perishable agricultural produce (fruits, vegetables, milk, fish, meat) quickly across the country at subsidized freight rates.
descriptionHi: देश भर में सब्सिडी वाली माल ढुलाई दरों पर नाशवान कृषि उपज (फल, सब्जियां, दूध, मछली, मांस) को शीघ्रता से परिवहन करने के लिए प्रशीतित डिब्बों वाली विशेष ट्रेनें।
ministry: Ministry of Railways / Ministry of Agriculture
benefits: 50% subsidy on transportation of fruits and vegetables
Temperature-controlled coaches maintaining cold chain
Rapid transport reducing post-harvest losses
Connects production hubs to consumption centers
Multiple routes covering major agri-production centers
eligibility: All farmers, traders, FPOs, aggregators
Booking through Indian Railways freight system
howToApply: Book through nearest railway goods shed or online through Indian Railways freight portal. No special registration needed.
howToApplyHi: निकटतम रेलवे माल शेड या भारतीय रेलवे माल पोर्टल के माध्यम से बुकिंग। कोई विशेष पंजीकरण आवश्यक नहीं।
source: Ministry of Railways / Ministry of Agriculture, Government of India
